content.title: Charles Schwab, Citadel Securities weigh entering prediction markets
content.summary: Charles Schwab and Citadel Securities executives have separately aired interest in prediction markets, but each is looking to steer clear of sports offerings.

content.title: Caitlyn Jenner escapes memecoin lawsuit as judge says token not a security
content.summary: A federal judge has tossed a class lawsuit over Caitlyn Jenner’s memecoin, saying it did not plausibly allege that the token was an unregistered security.

content.title: Warren claims SEC’s Atkins likely misled Congress over enforcement data
content.summary: SEC chair Paul Atkins is under fire from Senator Elizabeth Warren, who says he “may have been deliberately trying” to mislead Congress about the agency’s enforcement activity.

content.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
content.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

content.title: Kelp restaking platform exploited, $293M drained in attack
content.summary: The attack caused a "cross-protocol contagion" that has impacted at least nine crypto protocols, blockchain security firm Cyvers said.

content.title: Solana futures open interest rose by 20% this week: Is $100 SOL next?
content.summary: SOL’s steady recovery alongside the wider crypto market has traders debating whether $100 could be the next stop for the altcoin.

content.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty falls, but projected to rise in next adjustment
content.summary: The average block time at publication is about 9.8 minutes, falling slightly short of the 10-minute block target, according to CoinWarz.

content.title: Iran views BTC as a strategic asset, but USDt still dominates oil tolls: BPI
content.summary: The Iranian government chose Bitcoin as a payment method for oil tolls due to its confiscation-resistant properties, but only dollar stablecoins have been used so far.

content.title: Poland parliament fails again to override presidential veto on crypto bill
content.summary: Poland’s parliament has once again failed to overturn President Karol Nawrocki’s veto of the crypto regulation bill.

content.title: Stablecoins behave like FX markets as liquidity splits: Eco CEO
content.summary: Stablecoins promise seamless dollar movement, but fragmented liquidity is turning large transfers into complex execution problems, says Eco CEO Ryne Saxe.
